prompt: Add a Walkthrough preset camera at eye height inside the front door, looking inward, with GSAP transition.

assertions.text: Camera Y position is approximately 66 inches (5.5 ft eye height above floor at Z=0)
Camera position is near the front face of the building (Z small/near-zero or slightly positive for just inside the door)
lookAt target points inward along building depth (Z positive / into building), not outward
GSAP animation or easeInOutCubic lerp used for the camera transition (not an instant snap)
Integration into the existing preset view table shown with Preset name 'Walkthrough'
OrbitControls target updated to a point inside the building (not left at exterior default)
Camera config follows project standards: FOV 50, near 0.1, far 5000
